title: DragonForge
description: Dragon Forge is a RPG–survival with skill-gated gear, Create-powered industry, mythic bosses & dungeons, and lush worldgen. 200+ content mods + 90+ perf/QoL. Built for multiplayer on MysticHorizonsMC.
body:
# 🐉 DragonForge — Forge Your Legacy

**Version:** NeoForge 1.21.1
**Focus:** Action RPG progression • Attribute-based builds • Create megastructures • Mythic combat • Rich exploration
**Multiplayer-ready:** Designed for MysticHorizonsMC

The skies burn with dragons, oceans churn with ancient beasts, and forgotten depths whisper to the brave. **DragonForge** merges deep RPG progression, dynamic mob scaling, powerful Create automation, and sweeping world generation into a modern fantasy survival experience.

---

# ✨ Core Features

## ⚔️ **RPG Progression & Attribute-Based Builds**

A refined RPG system—no outdated class mods.

* **MOTP – RPG Player Leveling System**
  Level up through combat, mining, crafting, exploration, and more.

* **Pufferfish Skills & Pufferfish Attributes**
  Build your hero through:

  * Damage
  * Protection
  * Health
  * Toughness
  * Speed
  * Magic-linked stats

* Smooth, responsive combat via **Better Combat**, **Simply Swords**, **Immersive Armors/Weapons**, and movement upgrades like **Icarus** and **Paraglider**.

Gear is **earned**, not rushed. Your stats determine what you can survive, conquer, and craft.

---

## 🐲 **Mythic Bosses & Adventure Content**

Face enemies that truly evolve.

* **AM – RPG Mob Leveling System**

  * Mobs scale by **distance from spawn**, **dimension**, and **time elapsed**
  * Higher levels = smarter AI, greater damage, faster reactions
  * Every biome becomes a dangerous frontier

* Major boss & encounter mods:
  **Ice & Fire CE**, **L_Ender’s Cataclysm**, **Ascendant Mobs**, **Bosses Rise**, **RealmRPG Skeletons**, **Enderman Overhaul**

* Massive adventure structures:
  **When Dungeons Arise (+ Seven Seas)**, **Dungeons & Taverns**, **Moog’s Structures**, **Luki’s Ancient Cities/Capitals**, **Ice Pillager Castle**, and more.

Explore dangerous lands, delves, temples, and sky islands filled with high-level threats.

---

## ⚙️ **Create-Powered Industry**

Build machines, factories, rail systems, and magical-tech hybrids using the **largest Create expansion ecosystem available on NeoForge**:

* **Create** (core)
* **Create: New Age**, **Encased**, **Metalwork**, **Ironworks**, **Nether Industry**
* **Create: Connected**, **Copycats+**, **Hypertubes**, **Vibrant Vaults**
* **Create: Dragons Plus**, **Integrated Farming**, **Overpowered**, **Ultimate Factory**
* **Create Applied Kinetics** (AE2 integration)
* **Parallel Pipes**, **Power Loader**, **Blocks & Bogies**, and more

Pair this with **AE2**, **Storage Drawers**, **Sophisticated Storage/Backpacks**, and you get endless automation potential.

---

## 🌍 **Expansive World Generation**

Every dimension is transformed:

### **Overworld**

* **Terralith**
* **Oh The Biomes We’ve Gone**
* **Blooming Nature, Meadow, Autumnity, Ecologics**
* **Hybrid Aquatic**
* **Underground Worlds**
* **Oh The Trees You’ll Grow**

### **Nether**

* **Nether Depths Upgrade**
* **Moog’s Nether Structures**
* **Upgrade Aquatic (Nether features)**

### **End**

* **Nullscape**
* **End Remastered**
* **Incendium**
* **Aether + Deep Aether**
* **Explore Ruins Aether**

The world feels ancient, mysterious, and alive.

---

## 🧙 **Magic & Technology**

Fantasy meets arcane engineering.

* **Iron’s Spells ’n Spellbooks**

  * Dynamic Skill Tree
  * Spell Elemental synergy
  * Iron’s Spell Restrictions

* **Arcane Essence, Aero Additions (Aeromancy), Icarus flight enhancements**

* **Applied Energistics 2** for late-game storage

* **Sophisticated Storage & Backpacks**

* **Waystones** for intelligent travel

---

## 🧰 **Multiplayer Quality of Life**

* **Simple Voice Chat**
* **Jade & Jade Addons**
* **EMI stack:** EMI, Loot, Ores, Enchanting
* **Equipment Compare**
* **Controlling** (fixes keybind chaos)
* **Lootr** (fair dungeon loot)
* **Xaero’s Minimap & WorldMap**
* **GuideMe** tutorials
* **Gravestone + Curios compatibility**

These tools maintain fairness, clarity, and immersion.

---

## 🚀 **Performance & Stability**

Optimized for a 250-mod pack:

* **Iris** (shader engine)
* **Sodium (NeoForge)**
* **Lithium**
* **FerriteCore**
* **ModernFix**
* **C2ME**
* **Krypton**
* **Saturn**
* **PacketFixer**
* **Crash Assistant**

Stable even in late-game Create automation.

---

# 🧭 Progression at a Glance

* Actions level your **attributes**, not your class.
* Enemy difficulty rises the longer you survive.
* High-level regions contain dangerous bosses and rare loot.
* **Traveler’s Titles** + **Waystones** help early explorers stay safe.

> 💡 **Pro Tip:** In DragonForge, strength is *earned*: progress your RPG stats before challenging mega-structures or epic bosses.

---

# 🔧 Requirements & Recommendations

* **Java:** 21
* **RAM:** 6–8GB minimum
* **Suggested:** 8–10GB for shaders/multiplayer
* **Loader:** NeoForge 21.1.x
* **GPU:** Any Iris-compatible modern card
* **Server:** SSD recommended; 8–10 view distance

---

# 🕹️ Highlights (Selected Mods)

**Combat & RPG:** MOTP, Pufferfish Skills/Attributes (+ Unofficial Additions), Better Combat, Simply Swords, Immersive Armors/Weapons, Ice & Fire CE, L_Ender’s Cataclysm, Enderman Overhaul
**Magic:** Iron’s Spells ’n Spellbooks, Spell Elemental, Aeromancy
**Tech & Logistics:** Full Create ecosystem, AE2, Sophisticated Storage/Backpacks
**Exploration:** Terralith, BYG, Aether, Deep Aether, Undergarden, Upgrade Aquatic, Autumnity, Moog’s Structures, Dungeons Arise + Seven Seas
**Building:** Macaw’s suite, Handcrafted, Supplementaries, Design n’ Decor
**Food/Farming:** Farmer’s Delight, Let’s Do (Bakery, Vinery, Meadow, Brewery, Candlelight, Farm & Charm), Create: Integrated Farming
**QoL & Utilities:** Waystones, Jade, EMI, Lootr, Traveler’s Titles, Gravestone
**Performance:** Iris, Sodium, Lithium, ModernFix, FerriteCore, C2ME, Krypton, PacketFixer

---

# 🔄 Compatibility Notes

* **Keybind Overlaps:** Use **Controlling**
* **Shaders:** Iris-compatible packs only
* **Worldgen updates:** Create a **new world** for major version upgrades
* **Multiplayer:** Built to run smoothly on MysticHorizonsMC

---

# 📥 Installation

1. Install **NeoForge 1.21.1**
2. Add the modpack to your **mods/** folder
3. Allocate **8GB RAM**
4. Launch once, configure keybinds and shader settings
5. Begin forging your legacy

---

# 📘 FTB Suite Required (Optional Features)

FTB mods (Quests, Teams, Library) must be downloaded separately due to licensing.

📖 **How to Install the FTB Suite:**
[https://mystichorizons.net/threads/how-to-install-dragonforge-modpack.27/](https://mystichorizons.net/threads/how-to-install-dragonforge-modpack.27/)

---

# 🌐 Play on MysticHorizonsMC

DragonForge is built to integrate seamlessly with the **MysticHorizonsMC** network.
Watch for updated progression guides, dungeon events, and closed beta access for the DragonForge server.

---

# 📣 Credits

A massive thanks to all mod developers, artists, and library creators who made this world possible.
DragonForge carefully curates their work into a unified action-RPG-survival-automation experience.
